short_summary: War ongoing; US focus on Iran deal
rationale: The war continues at maximum background intensity; the US-Iran deal momentum is the most relevant new signal as it risks diverting US diplomatic and financial attention away from Ukraine.

top_events.title: US-Iran peace deal nearing signature, Hormuz reopening signaled
top_events.summary: Growing US-Iran deal momentum risks diverting Washington's attention and resources from Ukraine, potentially weakening the Western support pipeline that is critical to Ukraine's war effort.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war active combat continues
top_events.summary: War continues across Ukrainian territory with no major escalation or ceasefire — the baseline existential threat to Ukrainian life remains unchanged.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic for espionage
top_events.summary: Rising US-China tensions add marginal geopolitical noise but have no direct bearing on Ukraine's war situation or Western aid flows.
